mapper.select: SELECT loginID, name, zipcode, addr1, addr2, birthday , phone, email, edu_level, career, img_name , img_logi_path, img_phy_path, reg_date, ret_date, status FROM tb_userinfo
SELECT loginID, name, zipcode, addr1, addr2, birthday , phone, email, edu_level, career, img_name , img_logi_path, img_phy_path, reg_date, ret_date, status FROM tb_userinfo WHERE status = 'D'
SELECT loginID, name, zipcode, addr1, addr2, birthday , phone, email, edu_level, career, img_name , img_logi_path, img_phy_path, reg_date, ret_date, status FROM tb_userinfo WHERE status = 'R'
